propertiedtext.val: ALL DIMENSIONS APPLY TO FINISHED PART AFTER TREATMENT

UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED: THIS DOCUMENT IS IN ACCORDANCE WITH IESD STANDARDS\nALL GEOMETRIC TOLERANCES AND RELATED DATUMS APPLY MENTOR GRAPHICS CORP RULES\nDOES NOT APPLY WHEN A RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN FEATURES IS ESTABLISHED BY ORIENTATION

Main node component1 supplier part number
Main node component1 customer part number
Main node component2 internal part number
Main node component2 supplier part number
Main node component2 customer part number
Internal additional wire end component part numbers
Customer additional wire end part number1
Supplier additional wire end part number1
Internal additional wire end component part numbers
Customer additional wire end part number2
Supplier additional wire end part number2
